hearthvale_1.speaker: SIGNPOST
pages: Home shrine NORTH heals you. The marsh SOUTH does not.

hearthvale_2.speaker: SIGNPOST
pages: Bogmaw sleeps southeast. When it dives, only lightning finds it.

hearthvale_3.speaker: SIGNPOST
pages: Rock maze southwest. Something old glows in there.

lore_vale.speaker: LORE STONE
pages: Four Wardens kept the Vale. Marsh, Wood, Ash... and Hollow.

hearthvale_wheel_sign.speaker: SIGNPOST
pages: Burning things fear the frost. Frosted things fear the shock.
So it goes, all the way around.
